overall.description: A static cinematic establishing shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic industrial waterfront district. The scene features docked barges along a murky river, an expansive skyline of towering skyscrapers with smokestacks emitting white plumes, and elevated infrastructure under a clear, hazy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic industrial waterfront with docked barges and smokestack skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the cyberpunk waterfront cityscape from an elevated vantage point

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers with varied heights and industrial smokestacks emitting white smoke
red metal bridge structure spanning across the left portion of the frame with industrial piping
multiple flat-bottomed boats and floating platforms moored along the muddy shoreline
several tall industrial chimneys releasing white smoke plumes into the sky
greenish-brown body of water filling the foreground with gentle ripples
tall structure with large digital displays and neon signage on the left skyline
multi-level highway or transit line running horizontally across the middle distance

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view captures a dystopian cyberpunk waterfront district. The foreground shows murky green water with docked barges along the right shore, while the background is dominated by a dense industrial skyline of towering skyscrapers and smokestacks. A red truss bridge spans the left side, and an elevated highway cuts across the middle distance. The scene is bathed in warm midday sunlight with a slight atmospheric haze from the industrial emissions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide-angle panoramic view of a dystopian industrial waterfront bathed in a warm, hazy midday glow. It begins by capturing the murky green waters of a river where heavy barges are docked along the right shore. The perspective then extends across the middle distance, where an elevated highway cuts through the landscape and a red truss bridge spans the left side. Finally, the gaze settles on the distant horizon, dominated by a dense skyline of towering skyscrapers and smokestacks emitting white plumes into the atmospheric haze.
